_publications._publicationTitle: Neuregulin-1 beta and neuregulin-1 alpha differentially affect the migration and invasion of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor cells.

_contextSnippet: Following an initial decrease 5 minutes after stimulation, NRG-1β enhanced Src family kinase phosphorylation on Tyr416, with this phosphorylation peaking at 15 minutes, persisting to 1 hour post-stimulation
resourceName: Src family members phosphorylated at Tyr416 antibody (#2101)
details: Successfully detected NRG-1β enhanced Src family kinase phosphorylation on Tyr416 peaking at 15 minutes and persisting to 1 hour post-stimulation
